summary: The video captures a snowy road with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions. A person walks along the sidewalk on the left side of the road.

events_timeline.event: Multiple cars are seen driving on the road, including a white car moving ahead of the ego-vehicle.

uncertainties: The identity of the pedestrians walking alongside the road is unclear.
Some snow accumulation on the road may affect visibility.

risk_assessment.why: The primary concern is the snowy road conditions which could lead to reduced traction.
